_description: WT-06 heuristic fixture: a clean static repo with no anti-fit signals AND a decomposition where each worker's file-touches list is disjoint. The Step 6.5 heuristic should emit verdict=recommend-worktrees. This is the canonical 'fit' case the heuristic exists to surface.
expectedSurfaceText: This decomposition fits worktree mode well — workers' file-touches are disjoint and the runtime state is clean (antiFitScore=0). Consider re-invoking with --worktrees for hard isolation. (Default same-branch will work too.)
